problem id: 575f9709
category: bit_manipulation

rule: ROT(3) OR SHR(2)

examples:
  00101111 -> 01111011
  01101000 -> 01011011
  11110001 -> 10111111
  00011001 -> 11001110
  10111110 -> 11111111
  10100011 -> 00111101
  10010010 -> 10110100
  10010000 -> 10100100
  00001101 -> 01101011

query: 10101011
predicted answer: 01111111
